subject: Update helm charts with release docker artifacts
commit_message:
Update helm charts with release docker artifacts

Issue-ID: AAI-1188
Change-Id: I6b736bbba347cbea256371f4234f8b66b0c04ae6
Signed-off-by: Jimmy Forsyth <jf2512@att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: -Code-Review Verified-1

Gizmo fails with error:

Patch Set 2:

Can you submit a corresponding change to docker manifest as well?

Patch Set 2:

> @Gary Wu - https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/49877/

Got it.  Thanks.

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

Tested and verified that gizmo starts on latest docker in A&AI project in windriver lab:

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+2 Verified+1

Can we merge this?
I too have verified gizmo (and all AAI pods) come up and pass healthcheck.
Change has been successfully merged by Mike Elliott
